name: Doug Watts, BenCarson.com
subject: Just finished Ben's new TV ad, take a look...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194577:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r)
---

Hey Peter,

Everyone here at the campaign is excited about Dr. Carson's jump to first place in Iowa.

Yesterday's poll from Quinnipiac University showed Dr. Carson leading Donald Trump by 8 points. Now a second poll released this morning from the _Des Moines Register_ has us up 9.

It couldn't come at a better time because starting this morning, we'll be running our first TV ads there, as well as in the other early-voting states of New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

As a strong supporter of Dr. Carson, we wanted you to be one of the first to see it.

**[Will you take 30 seconds to watch it and then make a donation to help us reach as many early primary voters as possible?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194577:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194577:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r)
---

Peter, it's absolutely critical that we spread Dr. Carson's message of reestablishing a government of, by and for the people, particularly in these four early-voting states.

With his new lead in the polls, the spotlight is going to get brighter, and we need to make sure that we're telling people who Dr. Carson is, what he believes, and why he's most able to lead our nation to a future of more freedom and opportunity.

**[Please take 30 seconds to watch our brand new TV ad right now, and make a generous donation to make sure that we can keep it on the air.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194577:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r)**

Our campaign is growing and thriving because of you, and we couldn't be more grateful.

All the best,

Doug Watts
Communications Director

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194577:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31194578:sFAL-UmN7:m:1:876315805:AED42AE467A1305110F489A51235ED1F:r)

name: James Garcia, Political Director
subject: A note from the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563329:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r) |
| | | Peter, We've seen some solid numbers for Governor Christie over the past month. I wanted to share a few of them with you:
* In New Hampshire, polling this week shows Governor Christie in a virtual tie with Hillary Clinton in the general election. Every other Republican candidate polled, with one exception, loses the Granite State to Clinton by anywhere from 4 to 16 points.
* In Iowa, Governor Christie's net favorability has increased by 20 points since August. That's the largest gain in net favorability of any Republican candidate since August.
* In Pennsylvania, a state Republicans haven't carried since 1988, polling last week showed Governor Christie with a 4 point lead over Hillary Clinton in the general election. No other Republican candidate has a bigger lead over Clinton.
* Bloomberg and PPP both released polls this week in New Hampshire that show Governor Christie's favorable rating at 51% among Republicans. That's a 12 point increase in Governor Christie's favorable rating in New Hampshire since August 24 and a 20 point increase since June.
* The Quinnipiac poll released on September 24th showed Governor Christie with a 59% favorability rating among Republicans nationally, the highest that Quinnipiac has ever measured since they began tracking Governor Christie in 2011.

Over the last week and half, Governor Christie has been on the campaign trail in New Hampshire and Iowa, and next week he'll be heading to Colorado for the CNBC debate. Check out some updates from the road below.
> **_Quad City Times_ \- [Christie in Iowa: I'm the GOP candidate you can believe](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563330:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
> _Des Moines Register_ -[ 'Jersey bite' wins Christie fans in Iowa](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563331:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
> AP - [Christie beefs up Iowa operation, plans more time in state](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563332:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
> MSNBC - [Christie Supporters in Iowa Speak Out](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563333:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
> _Huffington Post_ \- [Chris Christie Will Put On A Show No Matter How Dim His Prospects Are](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563334:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
> _Washington Post_ \- [The new dark horse in the GOP race](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563335:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)**
The hard work is paying off! Thanks for everything you do. James [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44563336:69vNNoLNU:m:1:1516426255:BD9E12A1EE533438FE73ABF01CF85395:r)
---

---

name: Jessica Ennis, MarcoRubio.com
subject: how Marco wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44564589:6xhyToLrN:m:1:1349778030:4A1127C0B8E71E21F0F29A83F43C47F3:r)
---
| | | | Peter -- Check out this finding from a new ABC News/Washington Post poll just this week: **52%** _Republican leaning voters who say the more they learn about Marco, the more they like him_ That's good news because it shows just how straightforward our strategy has to be: introduce more people in more places to Marco. It's that simple. It's how Marco wins.
But that doesn't mean it's easy or it won't take hard work or that Marco can do it without our help. [_**Click here to donate $25, $50, or even $100 right now to ensure that more Americans learn about Marco -- both who he is and his vision for a New American Century.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44564590:6xhyToLrN:m:1:1349778030:4A1127C0B8E71E21F0F29A83F43C47F3:r) What exactly does that involve? That means funding Marco's travel to get him in front of more crowds around the country. That means going on air and online with ads telling Marco's story (and going around the mainstream media). That means funding our growing on-the-ground teams in key states to contact voters. We've got a strategy to win -- and it's working. We know what we need to do to elect Marco and he's counting on you to help us out. Sincerely, Jessica EnnisPolitical DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

It's that simple. It's how Marco wins. But that doesn't mean it's easy or it won't take hard work or that Marco can do it without our help. What exactly does that involve? name: John Kasich
subject: I Disagree, Mr. President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, I called today for Congress to override President Obama's veto of the 2016 Defense Authorization Act.

**The world is becoming more dangerous and more chaotic everyday because this President hasn't led on national security**. His veto of badly needed new resources for our men and women in uniform was reckless and must be resisted by Congress. We need to increase spending on our national defense while we freeze non-defense discretionary spending.

**If you agree, here are two things you can do right now to make your voice heard:**

**1.** [Sign our petition](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204332:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r) and stand with me in calling for a veto override. [JohnKasich.com/DefenseBill](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204332:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r)

**2.** [Make a $25, $50 or more contribution to help us raise the funds](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204333:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r) to take this fight to President Obama. [JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204333:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r)

Peter, together we can make America stronger and safer. This is one step to ensuring that needed funds get to our troops.

We can balance our budget and support our military. I'm the only candidate with a plan to do it.

Please take a moment to [sign the petition if you agree](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204332:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r) and forward this email along to your friends, family and colleagues!

Sincerely,

-John

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio
[JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204334:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r)

[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31204335:Wm0TzUmcN:m:1:958431888:776659DE7F7A12AA37A6DDE94BCD3D28:r)

name: Christina Reynolds, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: 11 straight hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Yesterday was something... | Friend --

Yesterday I sat in headquarters and watched every single minute of Hillary's testimony in front of the Benghazi Committee. It was a long day -- and I wasn't even the one testifying.

Hillary proved once again that she can handle anything the GOP can come up with to defeat her, and she did it with the strength and poise of a president.

**She's ready to fight for you -- stand with her right now:**

Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Director of Rapid Response
Hillary for America

name: urgent@murphyforflorida.com
subject: BREAKING: Speaker of the House Paul Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| That's not a joke, friend.

With the support of Tea Party members in the House, Rep. Paul Ryan -- the man who authored the Ryan Plan to end Medicare as we know it -- is running to be the next Speaker.

Fighting back against the Ryan Plan and the radical Tea Party will just get harder now. **We need to reach our $35,000 goal in the next 8 days to keep fighting.**

[**Rush in a $5 or $10 contribution today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216f/738133e4/3a7a5bff/7f832c29/3222411224/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151023?refcode=pme151023_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Paul Ryan has been pushing his plan to turn Medicare into a voucher system since 2008. It's actually passed in the House four years in a row. And that was before he took the top job.

With Ryan set to take the Speaker's gavel, taking back control of the Senate isn't just important -- it's imperative. The Senate has the power to stop the Ryan Plan in its tracks or wave it through to the President's desk.

A Democratic Senate will stop the Ryan Plan. And Patrick needs to be a part of that Senate.

[**Help us reach our $35,000 goal in October to keep up the fight, turn Florida blue, and help take back the Senate.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216f/738133e4/3a7a5bff/7f832c29/3222411224/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151023?refcode=pme151023_a&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks.

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216f/738133e4/3a7a5bff/7f832c2a/3222411224/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216f/738133e4/3a7a5bff/7f832c2b/3222411224/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae216f/738133e4/3a7a5bff/7f832c24/3222411224/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
